best_pick.creator: Joshua Leong (@jleonnn)
best_pick.attribution_text: Photo by Joshua Leong on Unsplash
best_pick.visual_description: Bright daytime Perth CBD skyline from Kings Park: vivid blue sky with scattered white clouds (top ~45%), full CBD tower cluster mid-lower frame, Swan River to the right, green parkland foreground; native 16:9 (4000x2250)
best_pick.text_safe_notes: Generous clean sky across the top for headline under a scrim; skyline occupies lower half; no faces; corporate tower logos only at small scale
warnings: elevated Kings Park vantage rather than across-water (water visible right)

best pick is an elevated Kings Park vantage (water right of frame) rather than strictly across-water; closest across-water composition (Unsplash guguFi5GTw4) was rejected on the explicit bright-day mood rule and is in the package for PK visibility
mm_c-03 contains small distant people (appear non-identifiable) and readable corporate tower signage at full resolution - reviewer to confirm
rows.search_summary: Commons API + Openverse (cc0/pdm) + Unsplash + Pexels searched; 12 downloads screened, 3 offered (2 Unsplash / 1 Pexels), 9 rejected (7 mood: dusk/night/golden-hour/overcast, 2 composition); freshness-excluded slugs/files honoured; bulk of Commons Perth material is CC BY-SA / CC BY and stays on existing holds
